title: The Java Thread Model: Lifecycle & Core Components
description: A visual representation of the Java thread lifecycle states and the core classes/interfaces used to create and manage threads.
relationships: A Thread object is created, entering the New state. Calling start() moves it to the Runnable pool. The thread scheduler moves it to Running. It can be moved back to Runnable, or to Blocked/Waiting/Timed Waiting via I/O, lock acquisition, or method calls. Finally, it completes and enters Terminated.
